audit_note: High-confidence records are promoted automatically. Main scope covers acoustic imaging/fusion; the mmWave track covers radar imaging, FMCW/MIMO-SAR, 4D radar, and radar point clouds.
mmwave_track_policy: Only final-venue papers from the explicit top-venue allow-list are allowed in data/mmwave_papers.json; arXiv-only records are excluded. Nature and Nature-family venues are included in the allow-list.
